goal.title: HTML report polish: outlier label stacking + Y-axis clipping floor
goal.notes: B: Chart 4 outlier labels overlap when two outliers on adjacent days ($147.70 $140.62 literally touch). Fix: stack labels across up to 3 vertical levels based on measured width; bump top margin when clipped to accommodate stack. C: smartMax clip cap has no floor — sparse data with zeros drags median near-zero and cap becomes 24x below rawMax, making all non-outlier bars indistinguishable. Fix: cap = niceMax(max(median*2.5, rawMax/5)); floor ensures outliers are never >5x the clip threshold. Warehouse chart 3 unaffected (median=0, condition already fails).

entries.notes: B: Chart 4 outlier labels overlap when two outliers on adjacent days ($147.70 $140.62 literally touch). Fix: stack labels across up to 3 vertical levels based on measured width; bump top margin when clipped to accommodate stack. C: smartMax clip cap has no floor — sparse data with zeros drags median near-zero and cap becomes 24x below rawMax, making all non-outlier bars indistinguishable. Fix: cap = niceMax(max(median*2.5, rawMax/5)); floor ensures outliers are never >5x the clip threshold. Warehouse chart 3 unaffected (median=0, condition already fails).

goal.title: HTML report polish: outlier label stacking + Y-axis clipping floor
goal.notes: B: outlier labels in Chart 4 now stack across 3 vertical levels with horizontal collision detection (measureText-based); top margin grows 20→36 when clipped to fit stack. Verified $147.70 and $140.62 no longer overlap at 1400px width. C: smartMax clip cap floored at rawMax/5 prevents 24× axis-clipping regression from sparse-zero ledger data; Y-axis went from 0-20 (was compressing 0.10→8 into 2px) to 0-50 (full readable range). Warehouse case unaffected. 2 guardrail tests pin the formulas. 482 total tests pass.

entries.notes: B: outlier labels in Chart 4 now stack across 3 vertical levels with horizontal collision detection (measureText-based); top margin grows 20→36 when clipped to fit stack. Verified $147.70 and $140.62 no longer overlap at 1400px width. C: smartMax clip cap floored at rawMax/5 prevents 24× axis-clipping regression from sparse-zero ledger data; Y-axis went from 0-20 (was compressing 0.10→8 into 2px) to 0-50 (full readable range). Warehouse case unaffected. 2 guardrail tests pin the formulas. 482 total tests pass.

goal.title: Retry Pressure chart — use main_attempt_count, exclude subagent spawns
goal.notes: Chart 2 currently uses derived_goals.retry_count which counts subagent JSONL files (Task() spawns) as retries. On claude-only data this inverts the signal: 9/22 threads show retry_count>0 (40.9% 'pressure') but 0/22 have main_attempt_count>1 (0% real retry). The climbing line is actually subagent-usage growth, which is a GOOD signal being read as bad. Fix: SQL uses COALESCE(main_attempt_count, 1) > 1; subtitle says 'main-agent session' to disambiguate from subagent spawns; no-retries message clarifies scope.

entries.notes: Chart 2 currently uses derived_goals.retry_count which counts subagent JSONL files (Task() spawns) as retries. On claude-only data this inverts the signal: 9/22 threads show retry_count>0 (40.9% 'pressure') but 0/22 have main_attempt_count>1 (0% real retry). The climbing line is actually subagent-usage growth, which is a GOOD signal being read as bad. Fix: SQL uses COALESCE(main_attempt_count, 1) > 1; subtitle says 'main-agent session' to disambiguate from subagent spawns; no-retries message clarifies scope.

goal.title: Retry Pressure chart — use main_attempt_count, exclude subagent spawns

Also fixed drawCombo conflating all-zero with no-data. 4 guardrail tests, 486 total pass. On local warehouse: retry signal went from fake 40.9% to honest 0%.

goal.title: CLI: --cwd override for render-html to unblock cross-machine warehouse (P0-5c)
goal.notes: warehouse cwd filter uses Path.cwd() absolute path — mac-imported sessions in warehouse-full.sqlite (160 threads) become invisible on linux because /Users/viktor/... never matches /home/viktor/... Add --cwd override so users can point render-html at cross-machine data explicitly. Minimal scope: just the flag + pass-through. No normalization, no git-remote magic. Option A from backlog.

entries.notes: Merge follow-ups: (1) GoalUsageResolution NamedTuple replaces 13-tuple return; upsert_task uses attribute access. (2) Static contract test parses cli.main() source to assert every commands.handle_* call passes runtime_facade. (3) CHANGELOG Unreleased entry for gpt-5.4 alias removal user impact. (4) import-linter cli-forbidden contract simplified via as_packages on domain and history packages; previously-uncovered domain.* submodules now guarded. make verify exit 0.

goal.title: ARCH-019: globally enable pylint across the whole project
